scripts.prepare:app: python3 scripts/apply_global_compliance.py && python3 scripts/fix_global_compliance_output.py && python3 scripts/apply_local_test_mode.py && python3 scripts/patch_test_network_guard.py && python3 scripts/fix_ai_provider_access.py && python3 scripts/ensure_ai_test_session.py && python3 scripts/apply_live_compensation.py && python3 scripts/fix_onboarding_scroll.py && python3 scripts/apply_storage_and_migration.py && python3 scripts/fix_storage_summary_markup.py && python3 scripts/apply_storage_cloud_mapper.py && python3 scripts/apply_tool_registry.py && python3 scripts/apply_migration_cloud_sync.py && python3 scripts/normalize_document_watermark_anchor.py && python3 scripts/apply_professional_document_workflow.py && python3 scripts/fix_onboarding_hook_order.py && tsx scripts/validate_test_dataset.ts && tsx scripts/validate_live_compensation.ts && tsx scripts/validate_onboarding_scroll.ts && tsx scripts/validate_tool_registry.ts && tsx scripts/validate_storage_and_migration.ts && tsx scripts/validate_professional_document_workflow.ts
scripts.build: npm run prepare:app && tsc --noEmit && vite build && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=dist/server.cjs
scripts.build:vercel: npm run prepare:app && tsc --noEmit && vite build
